"; $replacement = "New post on the site http://yahoo.com/abc1

"; // Replace the URL in the string $modified = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", $replacement, $original); echo $modified; ?> ``` This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string.
